mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_mfa_setting WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_mfa_setting ( user_id, enabled, verified, mfa_type, secret_key_encrypted, device_name, push_enabled, last_verified_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{enabled}, #{verified}, #{mfaType}, #{secretKeyEncrypted}, #{deviceName}, #{pushEnabled}, #{lastVerifiedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE enabled = VALUES(enabled), verified = VALUES(verified), mfa_type = VALUES(mfa_type), secret_key_encrypted = VALUES(secret_key_encrypted), device_name = VALUES(device_name), push_enabled = VALUES(push_enabled), last_verified_at = VALUES(last_verified_at), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE user_mfa_setting SET enabled = 1, verified = 1, last_verified_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_mfa_setting SET enabled = 0, verified = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_mfa_setting SET last_used_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mfa_challenge WHERE challenge_token = #{challengeToken} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM mfa_challenge WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
mapper.update: UPDATE mfa_challenge SET status = 'VERIFIED', verified_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE challenge_token = #{challengeToken}

UPDATE mfa_challenge SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_at = NOW(), device_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{deviceName}, ''), device_name), updated_at = NOW() WHERE challenge_token = #{challengeToken} AND status = 'PENDING' AND expires_at > NOW()

UPDATE mfa_challenge SET status = 'DENIED', device_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{deviceName}, ''), device_name), updated_at = NOW() WHERE challenge_token = #{challengeToken} AND status = 'PENDING' AND expires_at > NOW()
UPDATE mfa_challenge SET status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND expires_at <= #{now}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM mfa_backup_code WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND used = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mfa_backup_code WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND used = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE mfa_backup_code SET used = 1, used_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mfa_policy (id, require_admins, allow_backup_code, allow_push_approval, updated_by) VALUES (1, #{requireAdmins}, #{allowBackupCode}, #{allowPushApproval}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE require_admins = VALUES(require_admins), allow_backup_code = VALUES(allow_backup_code), allow_push_approval = VALUES(allow_push_approval), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = NOW()
